description: Smart Context Loading v2 — filtrage KB par mode et pertinence. Remplace le chargement aveugle des 7 fichiers.

always.description: Charge a chaque run, quel que soit le mode.
external: Dernier rapport executive summary (team-reports/YYYY-MM-DD.md, section ## Executive Summary uniquement)

dev_modes.description: Charge pour les modes feature, bug, refactor, hotfix.

files.filter: unfixed patterns only (fixVerified: false OR status: open)

audit_modes.description: Charge pour les modes audit, chore, et le FINALIZE.

never_load_raw.description: Ces fichiers ne doivent PAS etre charges en entier.
rules: velocity-metrics.json runs > 20 entries: prune before loading
team-reports/*.md detail sections: only load executive summary
agent-performance.json retired agents: skip retiredAgents array
